ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* JSON field for privacy settings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the relationship */,
  "followed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the target of the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., following, blocking) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of who last updated the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_relationships_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_relationships_followed_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target of the interaction (e.g., post, comment) */,
  "interaction_context" TEXT /* Additional context for the interaction */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction has been deleted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to any media attached to the post */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the post was made */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the post (e.g., public, friends, private) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been deleted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the content */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post or comment being liked */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., post, comment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the post */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being shared */,
  "share_context" TEXT /* Context or message added while sharing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for login */,
  "login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., notifications, privacy) */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., notification preferences) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., total_users, active_users) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., user engagement, content popularity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
